nasb.text: But Jesus, aware of this, said, “You men of little faith, why do you discuss among yourselves that you have no bread?

esv.text: But Jesus, aware of this, said, “O you of little faith, why are you discussing among yourselves the fact that you have no bread?

cnv.text: 耶穌知道了，就說：“小信的人，為甚麼議論沒有餅這件事呢？

ccb.text: 耶稣知道他们的心思，就说：“你们的信心太小了！为什么议论没有带饼的事呢？

csbs.text: 耶稣知道了，就说：“小信的人哪，你们为什么彼此讨论没有带饼的事呢？
